jokes.text: Delivery boy, Phillip J. Fry, reporting for duty. Dr. Zoidberg, soaking in brine.
jokes.setup: Professional military-style check-in format
jokes.punchline: Zoidberg is literally soaking in brine like a pickle
jokes.explanation: Strong character-specific visual that contrasts mundane roll-call with Zoidberg's alien biology needs

jokes.text: What this? This is the same toy surprising at last time!
jokes.setup: Amy examining mission equipment
jokes.punchline: Amy's characteristic broken English/malapropism
jokes.explanation: Standard Amy speech pattern joke - predictable but character-consistent

jokes.text: I can't work under these conditions, without me there is no mission. I AM the mission!
jokes.setup: Fry dramatically declaring his importance
jokes.punchline: Over-the-top self-importance about mundane delivery work
jokes.explanation: Good escalation and character work - Fry's delusional self-importance is on brand

jokes.text: We're back from the mission. Wha, what? You went without me?
jokes.setup: Fry just declared himself indispensable
jokes.punchline: They immediately went without him and returned successfully
jokes.explanation: Perfect immediate undermining of Fry's importance claims - excellent timing and structure

jokes.text: You were looking up cursewords in the dictionary, it seemed like a better use of your time.
jokes.setup: Explaining why they left Fry behind
jokes.punchline: Brutally honest assessment that dictionary curse words > actual work
jokes.explanation: Sharp character-driven burn from Leela - perfectly captures her pragmatic dismissal of Fry

jokes.text: Better than usual. We got medals.
jokes.setup: Mission went fine without Fry
jokes.punchline: Not just fine - better than when he's there, with tangible proof
jokes.explanation: Good escalation of the 'better without Fry' theme with concrete evidence

jokes.text: I'm really sorry I missed the mission. - I wasn't there, you might have needed me. - Nope. - But if I'd been there, I... - Nope. - Look ... - Nope. - Bender is great. - Nope.
jokes.setup: Fry desperately trying different angles to prove his worth
jokes.punchline: Leela's relentless 'Nope' responses, even to random Bender praise
jokes.explanation: Excellent escalating rhythm with perfect absurd peak - 'Bender is great' getting the same dismissal is inspired

jokes.text: I met him at that charity cock-fight last week.
jokes.setup: Leela mentioning where she met her date Chaz
jokes.punchline: Oxymoronic 'charity cock-fight' - violent blood sport for a good cause
jokes.explanation: Perfect Futurama-style absurd worldbuilding in just three words - charity cock-fight is brilliant contradiction

jokes.text: It's just that, the kind of importance I have... it doesn't matter if I ... don't do it.
jokes.setup: Fry trying to defend his importance
jokes.punchline: Accidentally admits his job is completely meaningless
jokes.explanation: Great character moment - Fry's dim logic leads him to undermine his own argument perfectly

jokes.text: There are guys in the background of Mary Worth comics who are more important than me.
jokes.setup: Fry expressing his lack of importance
jokes.punchline: Extremely specific, obscure reference to background characters in a boring comic strip
jokes.explanation: Brilliantly specific and absurd comparison - Mary Worth background characters is hilariously precise rock-bottom

jokes.text: What do you want to do? And I mean anything! You have the power. Name it and I'm there. You're the man. Well...OK. Let's go bowling. No.
jokes.setup: Bender's grand gesture of unlimited options for Fry
jokes.punchline: Immediately shoots down the most mundane request
jokes.explanation: Perfect Bender moment - grand promises immediately contradicted by selfish refusal. Classic setup/payoff structure.

jokes.text: I'm afraid we don't have a reservation, but... as you can see, I'm the mayor's aide! Table for two, please!
jokes.setup: Chaz trying to get a table without reservation
jokes.punchline: Pompously name-dropping his minor bureaucratic position
jokes.explanation: Solid character establishment - Chaz as petty authority abuser is clear and cringey

jokes.text: Free bread of the restaurant! Is there anything you can't do?
jokes.setup: Chaz getting basic restaurant service
jokes.punchline: Leela being impressed by literally the most standard restaurant offering
jokes.explanation: Good irony - free bread is literally the least impressive restaurant perk possible

jokes.text: I can't fail the mayor. Not ever.
jokes.setup: Chaz's dedication to his job
jokes.punchline: Dramatically intense loyalty to a probably minor municipal politician
jokes.explanation: Decent character beat showing Chaz's inflated sense of his civic importance

jokes.text: And bring a baggie in case he drops a steamer.
jokes.setup: Leela asking Fry to pet-sit Nibbler
jokes.punchline: Crude euphemism for picking up pet waste
jokes.explanation: Basic scatological humor - functional but not particularly clever

jokes.text: Smells like a 289 in progress. Failure to scoop...Oh yeah!
jokes.setup: Police responding to Fry's dog-walking incident
jokes.punchline: Treating failure to pick up dog waste like a serious crime code
jokes.explanation: Good future-world absurdism - bureaucratic police codes for mundane violations

jokes.text: Wait! I'm trying. It weight as much as a thousand suns.
jokes.setup: Fry trying to clean up after Nibbler
jokes.punchline: Wildly disproportionate description of pet waste weight
jokes.explanation: Decent hyperbole - hints at Nibbler's alien nature while being characteristically Fry-ish

jokes.text: You think I'm as worthless as you? Try catching garbage in your head and raising six kids, you dumb townie!
jokes.setup: Fry comparing himself to a trash can
jokes.punchline: Trash can angrily defends its dignity and life circumstances
jokes.explanation: Excellent Futurama absurdism - sentient trash can with personal problems and working-class resentment is perfectly executed

jokes.text: The poop eradication is but one aspect of your importance!
jokes.setup: Nibbler revealing he can talk
jokes.punchline: Dignifying poop-scooping with grandiose language
jokes.explanation: Great character voice establishment - Nibbler's pompous vocabulary applied to mundane pet care is perfect

jokes.text: Are you my mommy? Negative.
jokes.setup: Fry confused by the alien transformation
jokes.punchline: Nibbler's formal military-style response to childish question
jokes.explanation: Perfect contrast between Fry's innocent confusion and Nibbler's military bearing

jokes.text: Aren't you a fuzzy wuzzy wittle guy.
jokes.setup: Fry meeting the imposing Nibblonian council
jokes.punchline: Baby-talking to ancient cosmic beings
jokes.explanation: Good character-driven cringe - Fry's oblivious condescension to cosmic beings is perfectly in character

jokes.text: Does he not know? He does not know. He knows not? Knows not does he. - Not he knows? - Enough!
jokes.setup: Council discussing Fry's ignorance
jokes.punchline: Increasingly convoluted grammar variations on the same concept
jokes.explanation: Clever escalating wordplay that parodies formal council dialogue while building absurd momentum

jokes.text: Oh! Snap!
jokes.setup: Being told he's the most important person in the universe
jokes.punchline: Casual modern slang response to cosmic revelation
jokes.explanation: Perfect Fry reaction - completely inappropriate casual response to universe-shaking news

jokes.text: You're gonna eat that? Maybe later.
jokes.setup: Elaborate feast of a thousand beasts
jokes.punchline: Fry's casual disinterest in cosmic banquet
jokes.explanation: Good character moment - Fry's obliviousness to ceremony and grandeur is perfectly maintained

jokes.text: I remember the square dancing stomachs. Or that might be in the lately commercials.
jokes.setup: Trying to remember the brain attack
jokes.punchline: Confusing it with random commercial imagery
jokes.explanation: Great Fry moment - his confused memory mixing cosmic events with TV commercials is perfectly stupid

jokes.text: Because I'm so smart? Oh my!
jokes.setup: Fry guessing why he's immune to brain attacks
jokes.punchline: Nibblonians' horrified reaction to his intelligence theory
jokes.explanation: Perfect setup/payoff - Fry's confident stupidity met with appropriate horror

jokes.text: I did do the nasty in the pasty!
jokes.setup: Learning he became his own grandfather
jokes.punchline: Fry's crude rhyming euphemism for time-travel incest
jokes.explanation: Excellent callback with perfect crude Fry-style language - 'pasty' rhyme is inspired

jokes.text: Verily. And that past nastification is what shields you from the brains.
jokes.setup: Nibbler explaining Fry's immunity
jokes.punchline: Dignifying Fry's crude term with formal vocabulary ('nastification')
jokes.explanation: Brilliant character comedy - Nibbler adopting and formalizing Fry's crude language is perfect voice work

jokes.text: Yes. Except the Dave Matthews Band doesn't rock.
jokes.setup: Confirming Fry's drunk feelings are correct
jokes.punchline: Specific contradiction about Dave Matthews Band
jokes.explanation: Decent pop culture jab - works as period-specific humor but not deeply crafted

jokes.text: A giant memory bank twice the size of 3 ordinary memory banks.
jokes.setup: Describing the massive infosphere
jokes.punchline: Circular mathematical description that means nothing
jokes.explanation: Good nonsense exposition - the math works out but tells us nothing useful about the actual size

jokes.text: So they try to learn things? - Right. - Those bastards!
jokes.setup: Explaining the brains want to collect all information
jokes.punchline: Fry being outraged at the concept of learning
jokes.explanation: Excellent character comedy - Fry's anti-intellectual stance taken to absurd extreme. Perfect economy and character integration.

jokes.text: Then outrun the blast on this Scooty-Puff, Jr.
jokes.setup: Describing Fry's escape vehicle
jokes.punchline: Ridiculous diminutive name for what should be a serious mission vehicle
jokes.explanation: Great name creation - 'Scooty-Puff, Jr.' is perfectly ridiculous for a cosmic escape vehicle

jokes.text: Sorry, what? I wasn't paying attention. - That is most wise. - Who?
jokes.setup: Nibbler explaining Fry must avoid intense thinking
jokes.punchline: Fry's complete inattention being praised as strategic wisdom
jokes.explanation: Perfect character comedy - Fry's stupidity accidentally being exactly what's needed is brilliantly executed

jokes.text: Beavers made for life 11 greater than 4. For quality carpets visit Kaplan's carpet warehouse
jokes.setup: The brains finishing their scan of all universal knowledge
jokes.punchline: Final pieces of information are random facts and advertising
jokes.explanation: Good absurdist moment - the universe's final knowledge being carpet ads is nicely mundane

jokes.text: I'am at the input console. I'm a little nervous and I've got brain in my but-crack.
jokes.setup: Fry reporting in during the crucial mission
jokes.punchline: Mixing professional mission reporting with gross personal details
jokes.explanation: Decent character moment - Fry's inappropriate oversharing during tense moments is on brand

jokes.text: Is it true that post stamp glue is made of... - Correct! Toad mucus.
jokes.setup: Fry asking about stamp glue composition
jokes.punchline: Gross but oddly plausible answer about toad mucus
jokes.explanation: Solid gross-out humor with quasi-educational feel - works but not exceptional

jokes.text: What really killed the dinosaurs? Me!
jokes.setup: Fry asking about dinosaur extinction
jokes.punchline: Brain claiming personal responsibility with pride
jokes.explanation: Great dark comedy moment - casual admission of geological genocide with enthusiasm

jokes.text: Detecting trace amounts of mental activity, possibly a dead weasel or a cartoon viewer.
jokes.setup: Brain detecting Fry's minimal brain activity
jokes.punchline: Comparing it to dead animals or cartoon viewers (meta-reference to audience)
jokes.explanation: Excellent meta-humor - insulting the audience while advancing the plot is brilliant multi-tasking

jokes.text: Impossible, we are an ambitious young squad with everything to prove!
jokes.setup: Brain reacting to Fry's immunity
jokes.punchline: Ancient cosmic intelligence describing itself like young cops in a buddy movie
jokes.explanation: Great character voice subversion - cosmic villains with action movie dialogue is perfectly absurd

jokes.text: A quantum interphase bomb? Are you insane in the membrane?
jokes.setup: Brain seeing Fry's bomb
jokes.punchline: Using hip-hop slang ('insane in the membrane') while being literally a brain
jokes.explanation: Brilliant wordplay - literal brain using brain-related slang is perfect character-integrated punnery

jokes.text: And we'll form a tightly nitted clique that you wont be part of.
jokes.setup: Brains threatening Fry with eternal imprisonment
jokes.punchline: Final threat is social exclusion like high school mean girls
jokes.explanation: Excellent escalation subversion - cosmic punishment ending in petty social exclusion is brilliantly anticlimactic

jokes.text: I can't believe how fat I look!
jokes.setup: Seeing the traumatic moment that changed his life
jokes.punchline: Focusing on his appearance rather than the cosmic significance
jokes.explanation: Perfect Fry moment - missing the point entirely for vain concerns is absolutely true to character

jokes.text: will the owner of the white Pontiac Firebird... Nevermind, zero.
jokes.setup: Bomb countdown reaching zero
jokes.punchline: Interrupted by mundane parking announcement before explosion
jokes.explanation: Good tension-breaking misdirection - mundane interruption of dramatic countdown is well-executed

jokes.text: I wish the stupid racoons had never brought me to the future.
jokes.setup: Fry expressing regret about coming to future
jokes.punchline: Still doesn't understand Nibbler isn't a raccoon
jokes.explanation: Mild callback showing Fry's continued obliviousness

jokes.text: 6 hours! Psss. Sounds like a real nobody.
jokes.setup: Leela mentioning Fry waited 6 hours for tickets
jokes.punchline: Chaz dismissing genuine devotion as unimportant
jokes.explanation: Solid character work showing Chaz's shallow values vs. Fry's genuine effort

jokes.text: Mr Vogel, I thought we were going skating? No, we're not important enough, everybody just hold hands until the bus driver comes back from his haircut.
jokes.setup: Orphans asking about skating
jokes.punchline: Brutal honesty about their social status and absurd bus driver delay
jokes.explanation: Good dark humor about class inequality with absurd bureaucratic details

jokes.text: We came here instead of eating today.
jokes.setup: Orphans trying to convince Leela to let them skate
jokes.punchline: Casually revealing they're starving for this opportunity
jokes.explanation: Effective dark humor - casual mention of hunger makes the stakes uncomfortably real

jokes.text: What socks?
jokes.setup: Being told they can slide around in socks
jokes.punchline: Revealing they don't even have socks
jokes.explanation: Perfect economy and escalation - two words that deepen the poverty theme effectively

jokes.text: Talk a little louder, it sounds like you've some kind of tiny head on ya or something
jokes.setup: I.C. Wiener ordering pizza with tiny head
jokes.punchline: Pizza guy's blunt observation about obvious visual gag
jokes.explanation: Solid visual gag acknowledgment - character noticing the obvious absurdity works well

jokes.text: Quite possible. We live long and are celebrated poopers!
jokes.setup: Fry mentioning he cleaned Nibbler's poop
jokes.punchline: Nibbler's dignified pride in his species' defecation abilities
jokes.explanation: Great character voice - Nibbler maintaining dignity while discussing bowel movements is perfect

jokes.text: Just remember that Scooty-Puff, Jr. suckssss...
jokes.setup: Fry being pulled into the past, remembering his failed escape
jokes.punchline: Warning his past self about the inadequate escape vehicle
jokes.explanation: Good callback and time-travel logic - warning about the vehicle's inadequacy pays off earlier setup

jokes.text: Did everything just taste purple for a second?
jokes.setup: Nibbler erasing Fry's memory
jokes.punchline: Synesthetic description of memory erasure
jokes.explanation: Excellent sensory description - 'tasting purple' is perfectly absurd way to describe mental manipulation

jokes.text: Then I am the most important person in the universe.
jokes.setup: Leela saying she's happy to see him
jokes.punchline: Fry's simple logic making him cosmically important again
jokes.explanation: Perfect character conclusion - Fry's simple emotional logic providing the answer to cosmic questions is beautifully crafted
